item.title: Making Crayon-Inspired Boba Tea
item.description: Watch a creative and colorful experiment turning crayons into a boba tea-inspired drink. A fun visual project exploring art and food-inspired design safely.

media:content.media:title: Making Crayon-Inspired Boba Tea
media:content.media:description: Watch a creative and colorful experiment turning crayons into a boba tea-inspired drink. A fun visual project exploring art and food-inspired design safely.

item.title: ASMR Steak and Cake Challenge for Fun
item.description: Watch a playful ASMR challenge featuring steak and cake. Can participants guess flavors and textures correctly in this lighthearted food test?

media:content.media:title: ASMR Steak and Cake Challenge for Fun
media:content.media:description: Watch a playful ASMR challenge featuring steak and cake. Can participants guess flavors and textures correctly in this lighthearted food test?

item.title: Twist the Nutella
item.description: Watch a satisfying and oddly satisfying Nutella twist. See the smooth chocolate spread transformed in a visually pleasing and fun way.

media:content.media:title: Twist the Nutella
media:content.media:description: Watch a satisfying and oddly satisfying Nutella twist. See the smooth chocolate spread transformed in a visually pleasing and fun way.

item.title: Cooking Candy with 300 Matches
item.description: Watch an extreme candy-making experiment using 300 matches as heat. See the unusual process, challenges, and surprising results of this fiery kitchen test.

media:content.media:title: Cooking Candy with 300 Matches
media:content.media:description: Watch an extreme candy-making experiment using 300 matches as heat. See the unusual process, challenges, and surprising results of this fiery kitchen test.

item.title: High-Protein Keto Cucumber Salad in a Jar
item.description: Learn how to make a high-protein, keto-friendly cucumber salad in a jar. Easy, fresh, and perfect for meal prep or a healthy, low-carb snack.

media:content.media:title: High-Protein Keto Cucumber Salad in a Jar
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make a high-protein, keto-friendly cucumber salad in a jar. Easy, fresh, and perfect for meal prep or a healthy, low-carb snack.

item.title: DIY Waffle Fries at Home
item.description: Learn how to make crispy, golden waffle fries at home. Step-by-step instructions for cutting, seasoning, and frying to create the perfect snack or side dish.

media:content.media:title: DIY Waffle Fries at Home
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make crispy, golden waffle fries at home. Step-by-step instructions for cutting, seasoning, and frying to create the perfect snack or side dish.

item.title: What’s Inside This Thing?
item.description: Discover the hidden components inside this mysterious object. Watch as it’s opened up to reveal its inner workings and surprising details.

media:content.media:title: What’s Inside This Thing?
media:content.media:description: Discover the hidden components inside this mysterious object. Watch as it’s opened up to reveal its inner workings and surprising details.

item.title: Banana vs Crusher | Noahnator
item.description: Watch a banana take on a crusher in this fun experiment by Noahnator. See how the fruit holds up and the surprising results of the test.

media:content.media:title: Banana vs Crusher | Noahnator
media:content.media:description: Watch a banana take on a crusher in this fun experiment by Noahnator. See how the fruit holds up and the surprising results of the test.

item.title: Cucumber vs Egg Cutter Experiment
item.description: Watch a cucumber face off against an egg cutter in this fun experiment. See how each performs and the surprising results of the test.

media:content.media:title: Cucumber vs Egg Cutter Experiment
media:content.media:description: Watch a cucumber face off against an egg cutter in this fun experiment. See how each performs and the surprising results of the test.
